name: Kaine
text: Setup: Put your 2 Organic Webbing upgrades into play. No Responsibility — Interrupt: When the villain initiates a scheme against you, draw 1 card.

flavor: “They're calling me Scarlet Spider now. Another man's name... a better man. But I'm trying.”
name: Scarlet Spider
text: All The Power — Action: Deal 2 damage to Scarlet Spider → ready each Organic Webbing upgrade. (Limit once per round.)

name: Organic Webbing
text: Permanent. Hero Resource: Exhaust Organic Webbing → generate a [physical] resource for an event. Alter-Ego Resource: Exhaust Organic Webbing and take 1 damage → generate a [wild] resource.

flavor: “ ... I've been looking forward to this.”
name: Venom
text: When Defeated: Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an event and add it to you hand. [acceleration]

name: Scarlet Web Kick
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 8 damage to an enemy. If you paid for this card using only [physical] resources, this attack deals 1 additional damage and gains overkill.

name: Tangled Web
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from among schemes in play. If you paid for this card using only resources generated by Organic Webbing, ready your hero.

name: Mark of Kaine
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If you paid for this card using only [physical] resources, stun and confuse that enemy.

flavor: “I deserve this. But not from these bastards.”
name: Front Flip
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When an enemy initiates an attack against you, give Scarlet Spider a tough status card. If you paid for this card using a [physical] resource, draw 1 card.

name: Stealth Suit
text: Events tucked here may be played as if they were in your hand. Response: After you change form, exhaust Stealth Suit → choose an event in your discard pile and tuck it here (to a maximum of 3).

flavor: “This may take more than five minutes.” — Scarlet Spider
name: Spider-Healing Factor
text: Action: Exhaust Spider-Healing Factor → heal 2 damage from your identity.

name: Stingers
text: As an additional cost to play Stingers, take 2 damage. Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Stingers → deal 1 damage to an enemy. Deal 1 damage to an enemy.

flavor: “If I've learned one thing, it's that you could not pay me to swing around in costume with this kind of humidity.” — Peter Parker
name: Houston, Texas
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Houston, Texas → shuffle 1 Scarlet Spider card from your discard pile into your deck. Heal 1 damage from Kaine.

name: Peter Parker
text: Reduce your ally limit by 2. Setup: Set aside each Spiderling ally. Technologist — Resource: Generate a [mental] resource for a [[tech ]]card. (Limit once per round.) “I am very busy!”

flavor: “With my unparalleled genius and my boundless ambition, I'll be a better Spider-Man than you ever were!”
name: Spider-Man
text: Reduce your ally limit by 2. The Die Is Cast — Response: After an ally you control leaves play, draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Spider-Arms
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Spider-Arms → discard the top 4 cards from your deck. Add 1 card with a printed [mental] resource discarded this way to your hand.

flavor: “This is Spider-Patrol 3, at the corner or 23rd and Broadway. We're on the way.”
name: Spider-Patrol
text: Action: Put 2 set-aside Spiderling allies into play under your control.

flavor: “I've been tracking this monster across twelve dimensions. His power levels are off the charts. We have to run.”
name: Superior Kick
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 6 damage to an enemy. You may discard an ally you control to stun that enemy.

flavor: “Hear me, you cretins! I AM THE SUPERIOR SPIDER-MAN!”
name: Genius in Command
text: Hero Action (attack): Put 1 set-aside Spiderling ally into play under your control. For each ally you control, choose an enemy and deal 2 damage to it.

flavor: “Parker Industries! A revolution in start-ups! An overthrow of the technology sector!”
name: Dissertation
text: Alter-Ego Action: Search your deck for a card with a printed [mental] resource or the [[superior ]]trait and add it to your hand.

name: Web-Swinger
text: Response: After an ally you control leaves play, choose: • Deal 1 damage to an enemy. • Exhaust Web-Swinger → ready Spider-Man.

name: Superior Spider-Suit
text: Spider-Man gets +1 ATK and +1 DEF. Hero Response: After Spider-Man attacks an enemy, discard an ally you control → deal damage to that enemy equal to that ally's printed cost.

flavor: The Superior Spider-Bot can be found in the South-Eastern part of Downtown Brooklyn.
name: Spider-Bot
text: Interrupt: When the surge keyword on an encounter card would be resolved, discard Spider-Bot instead → draw 2 cards.

name: Web-Shooter
text: Enters play with 4 web counters. Hero Resource: Exhaust Web-Shooter and remove 1 web counter from it → generate a [wild] resource. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [mental][mental] → place 2 web counters here.

name: Spider-Island Lair
text: Action: Exhaust Spider-Island Lair, shuffle 1 [[superior ]]card from your discard pile into your deck, and spend [mental][mental] resources→ remove 2 threat from each scheme, ignoring any crisis icons ([crisis]) in play.

flavor: “This shall be my legacy. A brand new day...No, a brand new age. The Age of the Superior Spider-Man... The greatest hero of them all. And nothing will stand in my way.”
name: Superior Intellect
Spiderling
text: Forced Interrupt: When this card leaves play, set it aside. Fragile. (Attacks against this character gain overkill.) Legion. (2 allies with the legion keyword count as 1 ally toward your ally limit.)

name: Eddie Brock
text: So Happy Together — Setup: Put Symbiotic Bond into play, [[bonded ]]side faceup. Draw 1 card. While Symbiotic Bond is [[bonded]], Eddie Brock gets +3 REC and +1 hand size.

name: Venom
text: We Are Venom — Resource: Place 1 facedown boost card here → generate [wild][wild] resources. (Limit once per round.) Forced Interrupt: When an enemy attacks you, move each facedown boost card from here to that enemy. (Limit once per round.) "We...are...VENOM..."

name: Spider-Man
text: While Symbiotic Bond is attached to Spider-Man, reduce all consequential damage he takes by 1. Interrupt: When Spider-Man leaves play, draw 2 cards.

name: Webs of Venom
text: Action (attack): Ready Venom or the ally with Symbiotic Bond attached → deal 5 damage to an enemy. If you have a facedown boost card, stun that enemy. “You're big... but we've fought bigger.”

name: Unbreakable Bond
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When Venom defends, he gets +2 DEF for each boost card resolved during this attack (to a maximum of +6 DEF). Ignore each “Boost” ability for those boost cards. “Eddie... We are bonded forever. No one will break that bond.”

name: Horrify
text: Hero Action (thwart): Place 2 confused status cards among enemies in play. Remove X threat from a scheme, where X is the number of confused enemies in play. “Stand in our way and Venom will feast on your entrails!”

name: “I Will Eat Your Brains!”
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy (6 damage instead if you have a facedown boost card). If this attack defeats that enemy, heal 3 damage from Venom. “How shall we kill him? Slowly? No! Painfully! No! Slowly AND Painfully!”

name: Eddie's Apartment
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Eddie's Apartment → shuffle 1 Venom card from your discard pile into your deck. If Symbiotic Bond is [[bonded]], draw 1 card. Otherwise, heal 2 damage from Eddie Brock. “Slowly Learning. Slowly. While Eddie is asleep...”

name: Lethal Protector
text: Venom gets +1 DEF. Interrupt: When a boost card is turned face up while an enemy is attacking Venom, exhaust Lethal Protector → deal 1 damage to that enemy for each icon on that card.

name: Tooth and Nail
text:
Venom gains steady.
While you have a facedown boost card, Venom gets +1 ATK and his basic attacks gains piercing and overkill.

name: Klyntar Tendrils
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Klyntar Tendrils → if Symbiotic Bond is: • [[bonded]], remove 2 threat from a scheme. • Attached to an ally, ready that ally.

name: Symbiotic Bond
text: Permanent. Venom gets +1 THW, +1 ATK and +1 DEF. Forced Interrupt: When the villain initiates an attack against Venom, that attack gains overkill. Action: Spend 2 resources of the same type → flip this card.

name: Symbiotic Bond
text: Permanent. Attach to an ally. Attached ally gets +2 hit points, +1 THW, and +1 ATK. Forced Response: When attached ally leaves play, flip this card.

name: Symbiotic Relationship
text: Team-Up (Spider-Man and Venom). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. Heal 1 damage from Venom and Spider-Man
